overview: SmartLearn Quest is a commercial-grade educational gaming platform for Basic 1-9 learners covering ICT, Mathematics, Science, English, Robotics, and Critical Thinking. Features cinematic audio, adaptive narration, NPC companion, and hundreds of real playable games.
features: Basic 1-9 world navigation with progressive unlock system
72+ subject hub games with full mechanics, scoring, and three difficulty levels
85+ new Basic 1-3 sub-games across all 6 subjects
Cinematic audio engine with adaptive multi-layer music and 6-world ambience
Voice narration in English and Twi before every game
NPC mascot companion with animated reactions
Level-up cinematics, world unlock animations, boss battle intros
Local save system with IndexedDB auto-backup
Screen shake, particle explosions, combo streaks, cinematic zoom
